ValidationRule.description: Sales CCR Status should be Pending at the time of record creation.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_CCR_Validation_Rules__c), $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator", ISNEW(), RecordType.Name = 'Sales CCR', NOT(ISPICKVAL(User__c,'Pending')), NOT(CCR_Split_Exception__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: New Sales CCR Status should be Pending at the time of creation.
